name: Slew rate limiter
description:
This algorithm is a simple slew rate limiter, offering both logarithmic and linear slew.

You can choose to use a single slew rate for both rising and falling signals, or specify them separately.
You can also choose to use the same rates for all the busses, or specify them individually.

specifications.name: Channels
specifications.description: The number of bus channels to process.

parameters.name: Through
parameters.description: If enabled, the algorithm behaves as if all slew times were set to zero.

parameters.name: Up/shared slew
parameters.description: The slew time for both, or only rising, signals.

parameters.name: Down slew
parameters.description: The slew time for falling signals.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Chooses Logarithmic or Linear slew rate limiting.

parameters.name: Control
parameters.description:
Chooses which controls will set the slew times.
● ‘Single’ - use ‘Up/shared slew’ for both slew times.
● ‘Dual’ - use separate slew times for rising and falling signals.
● ‘Common single’ and ‘Common dual’ - as above but using the shared times from the Common parameters.

parameters.name: Up/shared slew
parameters.description: The slew time for both, or only rising, signals.

parameters.name: Down slew
parameters.description: The slew time for falling signals.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output bus. If set to ‘None’, the input bus is used as output, and the mode is always ‘Replace’.
